title: Modules, Packages, Environments, and Command Lines
description: Turn the reporting pipeline into an installable and repeatable command-line tool. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of an installable data-report command while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Separate module APIs from script entry points and import-time side effects.
Use virtual environments and declared dependencies for reproducibility.
Design a usable command-line interface with help, errors, and exit status.
